name: Local rules in NYC for AI disclosure in discovery after Heppner?
description: Fully discoverable per SDNY; no privilege.[1]

mainEntity.name: Local rules in NYC for AI disclosure in discovery after Heppner?

acceptedAnswer.text: Fully discoverable per SDNY; no privilege.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: SDNY requires treating AI outputs as discoverable non-privileged; produce prompts/responses if relevant.[1][4] Factors: no auto-protection. Update ESI protocols. Opponents can demand.
